Container.Name: triboon
Container.Overview: Self-hosted, Plex-polished, Stremio-style usenet streaming. Press play on any movie or show and Triboon mounts the best healthy NZB from your provider and streams it while unpacking - native RAR/ZIP streaming with seeking, TRaSH-style release ranking, owner-tunable multi-user streaming capacity, multi-user profiles with invites and Quick Connect, TMDB catalogs, source-scoped Live TV/IPTV playlists, online subtitles, and an Android TV shell. Configure everything in the web dashboard after first run (providers, indexers, TMDB - encrypted at rest). For legally obtained content.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent state: users, encrypted settings, watch history, verdict cache, thumbnails.

Config.Name: Media (optional)
Config.Description: Optional read-only media share for the local Libraries feature (scan your own files alongside usenet streaming). Point a Library's path at /media/... in the dashboard.

Config.Name: TRIBOON_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional: pins the token-signing / settings-encryption key across container rebuilds (64 hex chars, e.g. from `openssl rand -hex 32`). Leave empty to auto-generate into /data on first run.
